title: TeacherCharter v0.1
description: Input artifact for a Workbench Supervisor run. Names one invariant from the Periodic Table of Agent Invariants, the manifestation space to teach across, the budget, and the rubric.

critic_model.description: v0.2: presence enables the devil's-advocate panel slot; defaults to `model`. The advocate runs in a separate context from the lead teacher regardless of model identity (anti-collusion, §4.5).

faculty.description: v0.2: optional role assignment for the 3-agent panel (lead teacher / devil's advocate / goal generator). When omitted, all roles inherit `model`. Same model is acceptable for multiple roles; SEPARATE CONTEXTS are required regardless.

lead.description: Lead teacher model. Defaults to charter.model.

advocate.description: Devil's advocate model. Defaults to charter.critic_model or charter.model.

goal_gen.description: Goal generator model. Defaults to charter.model.

mcp_targets.description: v0.2: optional list of MCP servers this charter teaches skills FOR. When set, goal_gen receives the server's tool list (via tools/list discovery) and produced bundles MUST contain ≥1 tool_call edge against a listed server. v0.2 caps maxItems at 1; multi-server charters land in v0.3.

server_version.description: Pinned version (e.g. '0.4'). When set, gate.tool_version_consistency enforces it across the bundle.

server_fingerprint.description: Optional sha256 of the canonical tools/list response. When set, alumni skills can be re-verified against the exact server contract that produced them. v0.2 optional; v0.3 required.

tool_subset.description: Optional whitelist of tool names. When omitted or empty, all discovered tools are allowed.

discovery.description: 'tools/list' = call MCP tools/list at charter-load. 'explicit' = use tool_subset only (skip discovery — for hermetic test charters).

school_ref.description: v0.2: optional ID linking this charter to a long-lived School. When set, the Registrar (§8.4) appends this run's attempts to the school's CellLedger. When unset, the run is anonymous.

rng_seed.description: v0.2: optional deterministic seed. When set, the stratified picker, the goal generator (OpenRouter `seed` param), and the devil's advocate are all derived from `hash(rng_seed || cell_key)`.

manifestation_excludes.description: v0.2: optional explicit exclusion list. Cells listed here are NOT enumerated by the picker and are surfaced separately in the CurriculumBundle as `intentionally_excluded`, keeping the report honest about not-covered vs frontier-remaining.
